012221211200201000111102202102001011000022 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  020 = 0 * 20
  021 = 0 * 21
  022 = 0 * 22
  211 = 2 * 11
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0122 = 01 * 22
  1000 = 10 * 00
  11022 = 11 * 022
  20020 = 20 * 020
  21211 = 21 * 211
  021020 = 021 * 020
  100011 = 1000 * 11
  1000022 = 1000 * 022
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  01011000022 = 0101 * 1000022
  11022021020 = 11022 * 021020
  20020100011 = 20020 * 100011
  01222121120020100011 = 012221211 * 20020100011
  1102202102001011000022 = 11022021020 * 01011000022
  012221211200201000111102202102001011000022 = 01222121120020100011 * 1102202102001011000022
